description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a light beige body and a contrasting wood-textured top surface. The front features four evenly spaced drawers, each equipped with a black recessed handle for easy access. The cabinet stands on four small wheels, making it mobile and suitable for dynamic environments. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or openings, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The drawers appear to be spacious and are likely constructed from the same material as the cabinet body, suitable for storing documents or office supplies. The overall appearance is modern and functional, ideal for use in both professional and casual urban settings.
description: A beige filing cabinet with four drawers, black recessed handles, and a wood-textured top, mounted on wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing four closed drawers with black recessed handles and the wood-textured top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain beige panel and two visible wheels at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view with all four drawers open, revealing the interior storage space and drawer construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain beige panel and two wheels visible.
